message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[[1, 1.0], [2, 2.0]], [[3, 2.0], [2, 0.5]], [[3, 1.0]], [[4, 1.5]], []]","[{\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 4, \"demand\": 8.0, \"type_of_good\": \"chemicals\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [5, 5, 5]}, {\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 4, \"demand\": 6.0, \"type_of_good\": \"perishables\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [6, 6, 6]}]","[[0, 3], [0, 1]]","[2.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.0, 0.0]"],"focus":"Cross-contamination adjacency: perishable (higher priority) vs chemical (lower priority) competing for overlapping/adjacent nodes; tight time-window on perishables forcing capacity/cost adjustments and potential zeroing of lower-priority flow."},{"input_lines":["[[[1, 1.0], [3, 5.0]], [[2, 1.0]], [[3, 1.0]], []]","[{\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 3, \"demand\": 4.0, \"type_of_good\": \"pharmaceuticals\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [0, 0]}, {\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 3, \"demand\": 10.0, \"type_of_good\": \"textiles\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [5, 5]}]","[[0, 2], [0, 3]]","[0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0]"],"focus":"Minimum-flow threshold and zero storage nodes: pharmaceuticals have effectively zero daily capacity causing fallback-to-zero; textiles must route with no storage capacity available and may need expensive direct arc."},{"input_lines":["[[[1, 1.0], [2, 1.2]], [[3, 0.8], [2, 0.2]], [[3, 0.6]], [[4, 1.0]], []]","[{\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 4, \"demand\": 50.0, \"type_of_good\": \"electronics\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [20, 20, 20, 20, 20]}, {\"source\": 0, \"sink\": 4, \"demand\": 30.0, \"type_of_good\": \"pharmaceuticals\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [10, 10, 10, 10, 10]}, {\"source\": 2, \"sink\": 4, \"demand\": 10.0, \"type_of_good\": \"chemicals\", \"daily_capacity_changes\": [5, 5, 5]}]","[[0, 4], [0, 2], [0, 3]]","[100.0, 5.0, 5.0, 10.0, 0.0]"],"focus":"Cumulative capacity degradation and priority preemption: long daily degradation lists (flooring at 0.1), electronics (highest priority) vs pharmaceuticals (tight time-window) vs chemicals (lowest priority) creating adjacency-based blocking and rerouting pressure."}]}
